title: Frontend Developer
description: Build responsive web interfaces using React and Tailwind CSS. Work with the design team to implement pixel-perfect UIs.

title: Backend Engineer
description: Design and maintain scalable REST APIs using Node.js and Express. Collaborate with frontend teams and manage MongoDB databases.

title: UI/UX Designer
description: Create wireframes, prototypes, and high-fidelity designs in Figma. Conduct user research and usability testing.

title: React Native Developer
description: Develop cross-platform mobile apps using React Native. Integrate REST APIs and manage app state with Redux.

title: DevOps Engineer
description: Manage CI/CD pipelines, containerize apps with Docker, and deploy on AWS. Ensure system reliability and uptime.

title: Full Stack Developer
description: Build and maintain web apps end-to-end using React and Node.js. Work in an agile startup environment.

title: Data Analyst
description: Analyze business datasets, create dashboards in Power BI, and present insights to stakeholders.

title: Java Backend Developer
description: Develop microservices using Spring Boot and Java. Work with relational databases and REST APIs in an enterprise environment.
